name: phase3-on-save-camera-policy
description: Review camera_policy.py for correctness when saved

action.message:
camera_policy.py was just saved. Review it for:
1. plan() delegates entirely to self._nova_policy.plan() — vision NOT used during planning
2. has_vision property returns True
3. camera_stream property returns self._camera_stream
4. assess_step() calls self._vision_assessor.assess() — no try/except needed here (VisionAssessor handles it)
5. cleanup() calls self._camera_stream.stop()
6. create_camera_policy() creates NovaPolicy, VisionAssessor, CameraStream internally
7. max_replans falls back to int(os.getenv("MAX_REPLANS", "3"))
8. min_assess_secs falls back to float(os.getenv("VISION_MIN_STEP", "0.5"))
9. provider_name returns f"camera+{self._nova_policy.provider_name}"
Report any violations.
